candidates.title: Restaurant Menu Video Recording
candidates.tools: After Effects — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I need a freelancer to create videos of food items for a restaurant menu. The items to be recorded are food items, and they should be categorized into appetizers, main courses, and desserts. Requirements: - Record short, high-quality videos of each food item - Categorize videos into appetizers, main courses, and desserts Ideal Skills and Experience: - Experience in food photography/videography - Ability to create engaging and visually appealing food videos - Attention to detail and creativity Please provide samples of previous work.

candidates.title: Boutique Hotel Sales Document Creation
candidates.tools: Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I need to create a selling document for a Boutique Hotel. There are a lot of statistics to crunch and some basic real estate key points to put the emphasis on. I will share many photos to choose from and the whole story line is already established; Page 1 — Cover Title: Le Pleasant Hotel and Monte Verde Restaurant Page 2 — Executive summary Asset: boutique heritage hotel (1902), 10 keys, café/restaurant, multifunction room, signature terrace in the heart of Sutton. Positioning: strong online reputation (Google/Tripadvisor), leisure, foodie and business clientele. Recent KPIs: 2024 — occupancy 71.5%, ADR ~$205, RevPAR ~$147. Trajectory: Revenue 2026 ~$907.6k, 2027 ~$960.3k; 2027 net result ~$120.8k; target RevPAR $160–$170. Investment plan: $370.7k (junior suites, workstations, dinner service kitchen, business lounge, terrace, smart thermostats, exterior). Value: indicative price $2.20–$2

candidates.title: Professional Photo Editor for Restaurant Brand
candidates.tools: Photoshop — for layered/retouched assets and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I am looking for a professional photo editor and retoucher to improve the quality of photos for a new website for our restaurant and catering brand, Nasza Kantyna. The scope of work includes: Professional enhancement of food and restaurant photos Improving overall image quality, sharpness, colors, lighting, and contrast Consistent color grading across all materials Cropping and adjusting image composition for modern website layouts Preparing photos for desktop and mobile website use Retouching imperfections while maintaining a natural look Optimizing images for fast website performance without losing quality Creating a cohesive visual style for the entire website We are looking for someone with strong experience in: Food photography editing Restaurant and hospitality branding Website-focused image optimization Modern, premium visual aesthetics Please send examples of similar work, especi

candidates.title: Restaurant Menu Redesign
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price Project Overview We are a ramen and sushi restaurant called House of Umami. We are updating our existing printed menu and need a professional designer to revise the layout while incorporating new menu items and pricing updates. The goal is not a full redesign, but rather an updated, clean version of our existing menu that fits additional items without feeling crowded, especially on the ramen section. Our current menu is a tri-fold printed menu (22.5” x 12” unfolded) used for dine-in customers. Scope of Work The designer will: Update our existing menu design Insert new menu items Remove discontinued items Update prices Adjust categories where needed Optimize the layout Ensure all content fits cleanly within the tri-fold format Improve readability and flow Avoid overcrowding (especially in the ramen section) Reorganize sections if necessary Current menu sections includ

candidates.title: Tri-Fold Menu Design for Traditional Pub
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: PROJECT: THE GEORGE INN OUNDLE – MENU DESIGN I need a professional tri-fold (3-panel foldable) menu design created in Canva for The George Inn, Oundle. The design should be fully editable in Canva so that we can easily update prices, add or remove products, and print new copies in the future without requiring further design work. DELIVERABLES 1. Main Drinks Menu (Tri-Fold) Draught Beer & Cider Bottled Beer & Cider Gin Vodka Rum Whisky & Bourbon Brandy & Cognac Tequila, Shots & Liqueurs Soft Drinks Mixers Juices 2. Wine List (Tri-Fold) White Wines Rosé Wines Red Wines Premium Wines Sparkling Wines Prosecco Port Wine by the Glass & Bottle Pricing 3. Cocktail Menu (Tri-Fold) Signature Cocktails Classic Cocktails Spritz Selection Mocktails Premium Serves Seasonal Specials DESIGN REQUIREMENTS Use The George Inn Oundle logo provided. replacement_note: GEN-FREE replacement for a removed generative-expand task. NO image_generative_expand, NO generative fill/outpaint, NO upscale. O8 stock-hero = license a correctly-sized stock image + crop/reframe + place logo (NOT expand a small image).
